title: Replace All Digits with Characters
titleCn: 将所有数字用字符替换

testcases.input: s = "a1c1e1" Output: "abcdef" Explanation: The digits are replaced as follows: - s[1] -> shift('a',1) = 'b' - s[3] -> shift('c',1) = 'd' - s[5] -> shift('e',1) = 'f'
testcases.expectedOutput: "abcdef" Explanation: The digits are replaced as follows: - s[1] -> shift('a',1) = 'b' - s[3] -> shift('c',1) = 'd' - s[5] -> shift('e',1) = 'f'

testcases.input: s = "a1b2c3d4e" Output: "abbdcfdhe" Explanation: The digits are replaced as follows: - s[1] -> shift('a',1) = 'b' - s[3] -> shift('b',2) = 'd' - s[5] -> shift('c',3) = 'f' - s[7] -> shift('d',4) = 'h'
testcases.expectedOutput: "abbdcfdhe" Explanation: The digits are replaced as follows: - s[1] -> shift('a',1) = 'b' - s[3] -> shift('b',2) = 'd' - s[5] -> shift('c',3) = 'f' - s[7] -> shift('d',4) = 'h'
